name: sev-calculator
description: Automated SEV severity calculator for abuse incidents in DAVI. Evaluates abusive cohorts against DIHE harm sub-categories (invites/messages, feed posts, feed comments) and scraping metrics using WoW T7D comparisons. Applies per-metric baseline gates and assigns SEV 1-4 levels based on WoW percentage increase thresholds. Lives in lipy-davi as SevCalculatorService + SevCalculatorWidget + renderer.

prs.title: Add SevCalculatorWidget for automated abuse incident severity assessment
Fix SevCalculatorService NA crash in compute_metrics
feat: session context, investigation workflow, CLI improvements, and viewer enhancements
